title: CPI 3.14 Outcomes for Investigations Closed Administratively FY2016-2025
description:
This dashboard tracks six month and one-year outcomes for children who were in an investigation that was Administratively Closed and subsequently alleged as a victim in a new investigation.

The six month period is calculated by following those children who were in an investigation that was administratively closed within the first six months of the fiscal year (FY) and counting forward six months to see if the same child is a designated victim in an abuse/neglect child protective investigation.
